name: Tenable Vulnerability Management API (Nessus)
description: REST API for Tenable Vulnerability Management (formerly Tenable.io / Nessus). Comprehensive vulnerability management platform API providing endpoints for scan configuration and execution, vulnerability tracking and export, asset management, user and access control, agent management, policies, plugins, workbench analytics, credential management, network segmentation, tagging, and audit logging. Supports both API key and session token authentication.
